code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    let b = if is_end
      32
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let num = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        let sq = num * num
        if first
          result = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{sq}"
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
end
